provider: The Education University of Hong Kong 2026/27 Undergraduate Programme Course List

supplements.evidenceNote: The official 2026/27 course-list PDF publishes 27 courses with confirmed codes and titles under Major Core, Major Elective Courses, Major Interdisciplinary Course, Living and Working in Our Country, Internship, and Final Year Project. It publishes credit-point totals by curriculum group, but not per-course credit points or a recommended year/semester study pattern, so credits, recommendedYear and semester are intentionally left unknown. The three Cross-Faculty Core Course components have no course codes in the PDF and are intentionally omitted rather than assigned invented codes. The programme page confirms 121 cps for Year 1 Admissions and 60 cps for Senior Year Admissions, but those aggregates are not allocated to individual courses here and this supplement does not assert graduation completion.
